allow: PowerShell(if \(Test-Path "C:\\Program Files\\ngrok\\ngrok.exe"\) { Write-Output "Found in Program Files" } elseif \(Test-Path "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Programs\\ngrok\\ngrok.exe"\) { Write-Output "Found in LocalAppData" } elseif \(Test-Path "$env:USERPROFILE\\ngrok.exe"\) { Write-Output "Found in User Profile" } else { Write-Output "Not found in common locations" })
